# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';
import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';

interface EdgeConfig {
  API_KEY?: string;
  DB_URL?: string;
  FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS?: boolean;
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler() {
  const defaultValues = {
    API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
    DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
    FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS: false,
  };

  let edgeConfig: EdgeConfig = {};
  if (process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
    try {
      edgeConfig = (await get<EdgeConfig>()) || {};
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to retrieve Edge Config:', error);
      // Fallback to default values if Edge Config fetching fails
    }
  } else {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG environment variable is not set. Using default values.');
  }

  const API_KEY = edgeConfig.API_KEY ?? defaultValues.API_KEY;
  const DB_URL = edgeConfig.DB_URL ?? defaultValues.DB_URL;
  const FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS = edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS ?? defaultValues.FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS;

  return NextResponse.json({
    message: 'Edge Function running with configuration',
    config: {
      API_KEY: API_KEY,
      DB_URL: DB_URL,
      FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS: FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS,
    },
    source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'Edge Config' : 'Defaults (EDGE_CONFIG not set)',
  });
}
